protocol.name: BEVP (Bitcoin Experience Validation Protocol)
protocol.tagline: Make experience transcend time; preserve life's meaning through physical consensus
protocol.slogan: Bitcoin gives wealth an immutable past; BEVP gives life an unforgotten past.

vows.title: Eternal Vows
vows.tagline: Seal our genesis promise in the inexorable flow of time.
vows.desc: Transform promises into an irreversible off-chain state, invisibly anchored on Bitcoin mainnet.

vault.title: Eternal Vault
vault.tagline: A private chronicle of your family's steps.
vault.desc: A continuous record of life's path driven by family multi-keys on a Merkle-DAG.

heritage.title: Eternal Heritage
heritage.tagline: Digital legacy secured by mathematical laws and time-locks.
heritage.desc: Securely transfer memories and assets using Shamir sharing and time-lock release.

shield.title: Reality Shield
shield.tagline: Certificates of origin for human experience in the age of synthetic minds.
shield.desc: Verify physical existence through spatiotemporal entropy cross-validation.

legal.framework: RUFADAA & Property (Digital Assets etc) Act 2025 Template
legal.disclaimer: This letter of wishes is for use with your formal will and counsel. It is not legal advice and does not by itself create a valid will.
legal.time_lock_warning: Time-lock is active. No external mechanism can decrypt this archive prior to the designated block height.

common.verify_success: Experience validated! This data did exist at the designated block height and remains untampered.
common.backup_prompt: Download and keep your offline Verifier so you can still check proofs without the platform.

vows.defaultText: In this irreversible span of time, we promise...
